caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, held on April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The setting is a conference room with several individuals seated around a table, engaged in discussion. The participants appear to be committee members and possibly stakeholders or experts, dressed in business attire, indicating the seriousness of the proceedings. The camera pans across the room, showing various attendees taking notes, listening attentively, and preparing to speak. The atmosphere suggests a structured and professional environment, with documents, microphones, and personal items like coffee mugs visible on the table, reflecting the ongoing deliberations and discussions surrounding the proposed legislation.
